data.body:
Red Knot.

The Red Knot (Calidris canutus) is a medium-sized shorebird known for its incredible long-distance migrations between Arctic breeding grounds and wintering sites around the world, often traveling thousands of miles. It's a stocky sandpiper with cinnamon-red plumage. 

📸: Subrata Basak

data.body:
If they try to solve this by any means necessary, the only option is to mass-produce both source material and anime using AI.
In fact, Shueisha, which publishes Jump, is scrambling to make AI manga a fait accompli, and anime studios will likely try to use AI to cut down on production hours.
